name: cline
description: Delegate coding tasks to the local Cline CLI from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate local coding tasks to Cline from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Run Cline delegation, review, setup, usage, profile, and model-feed workflows from Codex using an isolated local ClinePass sign-in.
defaultPrompt: Use $cline:delegate to plan a focused coding task.
Use $cline:review to review my current changes.
Use $cline:setup to check my local Cline prerequisite.
